transforms: Merged sy-al-shahbaa-university into sy-al-shahba-university as an alternate English spelling, corrected Arabic spelling, Wikidata identifier, and source-backed centroid.
Merged Wikidata Q28715211 into sy-bilad-al-sham-university-for-sharia-sciences as an Arabic alias and Wikidata identifier.
Did not create new records for these candidates because existing canonical records already represent the institutions.
reviewNotes: Duplicate/enrichment cleanup for held Wikidata-only candidates. The candidate backlog now leaves only Homs Military Academy and Wikidata Q114672251 for later review.
